full_text:
Cao Xiu (Wenlie) 曹休 (文烈)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Xiu (曹休), styledWenlie (文烈), was born in Pei. Performed well against Shu and Wu but fell for Zhou Fang’s ploy at Shiting. Cao Xiu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Xiu lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
